# Royalty Auto Care

Premium mobile detailing, expert paint correction, and System X ceramic coatings serving Valrico, Tampa, Brandon, and the surrounding Tampa Bay Area.

## Core Services

- **Auto Detailing**: [Auto Detailing Page](/auto-detailing) — Interior deep cleaning, exterior hand washes, engine bay cleaning, headlight restoration, window polishing, and wrap removal.
- **Paint Correction**: [Paint Correction Page](/paint-correction) — 1-Step paint enhancement, 2-Step paint correction, and 3-Step paint correction.
- **Ceramic Coating**: [Ceramic Coating Page](/ceramic-coating) — 2-Year, 6-Year, and 10-Year certified System X paint protection, plus interior and surface add-ons.
- **Maintenance Plans**: [Maintenance & Fleet Page](/maintenance-plans) — Weekly, bi-weekly, monthly, or bi-monthly routine upkeep plans.
- **Fleet Services**: [Maintenance & Fleet Page](/maintenance-plans) — Commercial mobile washing for business vehicle fleets.

## Contact & Location

- **Phone**: (813) 539-4723
- **Email**: rroyaltyautocare@gmail.com
- **Area**: Valrico, FL 33596 (Serving Greater Tampa Bay Area)
- **Hours**: Monday - Sunday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- **Quote Booking**: [Contact Page](/contact)
